auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Evenium API key or access token sent with the X-Evenium-Token header. Retrieve it from your Evenium profile API key settings.

actions.name: get_event
actions.description: Get one Evenium event by event ID or external event ID.

eventId.description: The Evenium event identifier or external event ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Evenium event.

event.description: One Evenium event returned by the organizer API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Evenium event lookup response.

actions.name: get_guest
actions.description: Get one Evenium guest by contact ID or guest code for a given event.

eventId.description: The Evenium event identifier or external event ID.

contactId.description: The Evenium contact identifier or external contact ID.

items.description: One guest expansion field name accepted by Evenium.

fields.description: Optional guest sub-resources to expand on guest responses.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Evenium guest. Provide either contactId or guestCode.

contactId.description: The Evenium contact identifier for the guest.

customId.description: The external custom identifier attached to the guest.

eventId.description: The Evenium event identifier that owns the guest.

guestCode.description: The Evenium guest code used for direct guest lookup.

status.description: The guest RSVP status returned by Evenium.

fields.description: The custom fields attached to the guest.

guest.description: One Evenium guest returned by the organizer API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Evenium guest lookup response.

actions.name: get_guest_post_status
actions.description: Get the current post-event attendance status for one Evenium guest.

eventId.description: The Evenium event identifier or external event ID.

contactId.description: The Evenium contact identifier or external contact ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Evenium guest post-event status.

contactId.description: The Evenium contact identifier for the guest.

eventId.description: The Evenium event identifier that owns the guest.

postStatus.description: The current post-event status returned by Evenium.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Evenium guest post-status response.

actions.name: get_guest_status
actions.description: Get the current RSVP status for one Evenium guest.

eventId.description: The Evenium event identifier or external event ID.

contactId.description: The Evenium contact identifier or external contact ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Evenium guest status.

contactId.description: The Evenium contact identifier for the guest.

eventId.description: The Evenium event identifier that owns the guest.

status.description: The current RSVP status returned by Evenium.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Evenium guest status response.

actions.name: list_events
actions.description: List Evenium events with optional title, status, date filters, and pagination.

maxResults.description: The maximum number of events to return.

firstResult.description: The zero-based offset of the first event to return.

startsAfter.description: Only return events that start after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

startsBefore.description: Only return events that start before this ISO 8601 timestamp.

endsAfter.description: Only return events that end after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

endsBefore.description: Only return events that end before this ISO 8601 timestamp.

createdAfter.description: Only return events created after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

createdBefore.description: Only return events created before this ISO 8601 timestamp.

title.description: Only return events whose title contains this value.

status.description: Only return events with this Evenium status value.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Evenium events.

nbrResults.description: The non-negative pagination value returned by Evenium.

maxResults.description: The non-negative pagination value returned by Evenium.

firstResult.description: The non-negative pagination value returned by Evenium.

more.description: Whether Evenium reports that more events are available.

items.description: One Evenium event returned by the organizer API.

events.description: The events returned by the current page.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Evenium event list response.

actions.name: list_guests
actions.description: List guests for one Evenium event with optional attendee filters, expansions, and pagination.

eventId.description: The Evenium event identifier or external event ID.

maxResults.description: The maximum number of guests to return.

firstResult.description: The zero-based offset of the first guest to return.

items.description: One guest expansion field name accepted by Evenium.

fields.description: Optional guest sub-resources to expand on guest responses.

status.description: Only return guests with this Evenium RSVP status.

since.description: Only return guests updated after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

until.description: Only return guests updated before this ISO 8601 timestamp.

lastName.description: Only return guests whose last name matches this value.

firstName.description: Only return guests whose first name matches this value.

email.description: Only return guests whose email exactly matches this value.

company.description: Only return guests whose company matches this value.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Evenium guests.

nbrResults.description: The non-negative pagination value returned by Evenium.

maxResults.description: The non-negative pagination value returned by Evenium.

firstResult.description: The non-negative pagination value returned by Evenium.

more.description: Whether Evenium reports that more guests are available.

contactId.description: The Evenium contact identifier for the guest.

customId.description: The external custom identifier attached to the guest.

eventId.description: The Evenium event identifier that owns the guest.

guestCode.description: The Evenium guest code used for direct guest lookup.

status.description: The guest RSVP status returned by Evenium.

fields.description: The custom fields attached to the guest.

items.description: One Evenium guest returned by the organizer API.

guests.description: The guests returned by the current page.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Evenium guest list response.
